faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Kearny typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points requiring sealing. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Kearny residents and businesses. Our team understands that rat infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to prevent property damage and health risks.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination includes a thorough inspection, strategic trap and bait station placement, entry point identification and sealing, removal of dead rodents, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. faqs.question: Are rat problems common in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kearny experiences rat activity year-round due to its industrial areas, aging infrastructure, and proximity to the Passaic River. Rats are particularly problematic in older buildings, near food establishments, and in areas with accessible garbage. Regular professional pest control helps prevent infestations before they become serious.
